'''havogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dragadiddle|dragadiddle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-v-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dragadiddle|dragadiddle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| havogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hævegeth|hævegeth]] || [[word:hævegej|hævegej]] || [[word:hævegesh|hævegesh]] || [[word:hævege|hævege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:havovogoth|havovogoth]] || [[word:havovogoj|havovogoj]] || [[word:havovogosh|havovogosh]] || [[word:havovogo|havovogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:havogoth|havogoth]] || [[word:havogoj|havogoj]] || [[word:havogosh|havogosh]] || [[word:havogo|havogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:havofgoth|havofgoth]] || [[word:havofgoj|havofgoj]] || [[word:havofgosh|havofgosh]] || [[word:havofgof|havofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:havogotho|havogotho]] || [[word:havogojo|havogojo]] || [[word:havogosho|havogosho]] || [[word:havogoko|havogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:havogoth|havogoth]] || [[word:havogoj|havogoj]] || [[word:havogosh|havogosh]] || [[word:havogo|havogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:havogothol|havogothol]] || [[word:havogojol|havogojol]] || [[word:havogoshol|havogoshol]] || [[word:havogokol|havogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:havogothotho|havogothotho]] || [[word:havogojojo|havogojojo]] || [[word:havogoshosho|havogoshosho]] || [[word:havogoko|havogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:havogothon|havogothon]] || [[word:havogojon|havogojon]] || [[word:havogoshon|havogoshon]] || [[word:havogokon|havogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:havogothoro|havogothoro]] || [[word:havogojoro|havogojoro]] || [[word:havogoshoro|havogoshoro]] || [[word:havogokoro|havogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
